name: cracklib-runtime
title: cracklib-runtime
summary: runtime support for password checker library cracklib2
description:
runtime support for password checker library cracklib2
Run-time support programs which use the shared library in libcrack2
including programs to build the password dictionary databases used by
the functions in the shared library.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use cracklib-check because runtime support for password checker library cracklib2.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use cracklib-check as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `cracklib-check` as documented upstream for cracklib-check.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair cracklib-check with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `cracklib-check --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.

documentation.how_to_use: Install/setup: sudo apt install cracklib2. runtime support for password checker library cracklib2.
documentation.when_to_use: Use during the 'install' phase against surfaces [local] in the Kali Linux category. Fits when the engagement needs: runtime support for password checker library cracklib2.
documentation.why_to_use: Prefer this tool based on upstream description: cracklib-check - Check passwords using libcrack2.
usage_sections: Install with: sudo apt install cracklib2
Install with: sudo apt install cracklib2
